summary.description: A concise plain-language summary of the technical plan. Do not include markdown headings.

implementationPlan.description: Ordered executable implementation steps. Each item must be a concrete action sentence, not a section title or document heading.

filesToModify.description: Existing repository-relative file paths that should be modified.

newFiles.description: Repository-relative file paths that should be newly created. Output the final file path, not a directory path.

riskPoints.description: Short plain-language risks or unresolved technical concerns.
